reasoning: Both sets miss the certification-modernization streamlining rule, but Content B additionally surfaces the duty-and-rest preemption rule (via the crowell.com snippet explicitly describing flightcrew/flight attendant duty and rest preemption) and provides a more detailed, directly sourced AD summary (transportation.gov listing MD-10/DC-10/MD-11 models) plus a direct Federal Register link for the supersonic NPRM.
